name: GD Live
description: Native Geometry Dash streamer overlays, Twitch chat, chat-command effects, and level request tools.

enable-overlays.name: Enable Overlays
enable-overlays.description: Draw the GD-Live progress HUD, click tracker, chat sidebar, and session analytics in-game.

show-progress-hud.name: Progress HUD
show-progress-hud.description: Show a persistent native progress bar.

show-click-tracker.name: Click Tracker
show-click-tracker.description: Show click count, click interval, and visual input pulses.

show-session-analytics.name: Session Analytics
show-session-analytics.description: Show attempt count, elapsed time, best percent, and success rate.

progress-position.name: Progress Bar Position
progress-position.description: Screen edge for the GD-Live progress HUD.

progress-x.name: Progress X
progress-x.description: Progress bar X offset in screen points.

progress-y.name: Progress Y
progress-y.description: Progress bar Y offset in screen points.

twitch-account-link.name: Twitch Account
twitch-account-link.description: Link Twitch from inside Geometry Dash. GD-Live auto-starts chat and level requests after linking. Tokens are stored locally.

twitch-channel.name: Twitch Account Link
twitch-channel.description: Paste a Twitch channel link or username. GD-Live cleans it up automatically.

enable-chat.name: Enable Chat Sidebar
enable-chat.description: Displays linked Twitch chat in the sidebar. Chat still connects for level requests when this is off.

enable-chat-commands.name: Enable Chat Commands
enable-chat-commands.description: Allows approved bridge commands like !randomshake and !colorshift to trigger safe gameplay effects.

enable-level-requests.name: Enable Level Requests
enable-level-requests.description: Queues chat messages like !request 12345678 and exposes Play Next buttons in the GD-Live menus.

max-request-queue.name: Max Request Queue
max-request-queue.description: Maximum number of chat-requested levels GD-Live keeps queued.

command-cooldown.name: Command Cooldown
command-cooldown.description: Minimum seconds between chat-triggered gameplay effects.

sidebar-x.name: Sidebar X
sidebar-x.description: Chat sidebar X offset in screen points.

sidebar-y.name: Sidebar Y
sidebar-y.description: Chat sidebar Y offset in screen points.
